chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P. No. D – 1129 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 16-09-2025 Mr. Abdullah Khan Korai, Advocate along with petitioner (on bail). Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General Sindh. >>>>>>..<<<<<< Initially this Petition was filed by the Petitioner because of the bar contained under Section 35 of the Control of Narcotics Substances (Amendment) Act, 2024. Since the Provincial Government of Sindh has promulgated the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances (Amendment) Act, 2025, by amending the previous Act through the Sindh Government Gazette published on 18.08.2025, whereby the petitioner has been given appropriate forum for bail, therefore, this petition has become infructuous. However, learned Counsel for the petitioner submits that this petition may be converted into an application for protective bail enabling the petitioner to appear before the appropriate forum / Special Court / Court of Sessions Judge, having jurisdiction. Learned Law Officers have no objection to the request so made by the Counsel. Accordingly, this petition is converted into an application for protective bail, and the petitioner shall be deemed to be on protective bail for a period of ten days from today on same terms and conditions as mentioned in order dated 22.07.2025, and against the same surety, as already furnished. Office to assign proper number to the Court’s file. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms.
Office to assign proper number to the Court’s file. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
